note: OpenAI-style function-calling specs for local Kali tool wrappers. The 'command' field is the CLI template; {param} is filled from the model's arguments. All commands run under a sandbox with --network none unless 'network' is true, and are subject to the scope guardrail (see agent/schema/scope_guardrail.md).

function.name: nmap_scan
function.description: Network discovery and service/version detection against an in-scope target. Use for authorized recon only.

target.description: IP or hostname within authorized scope

network.description: true only if target is explicitly authorized for network access

function.name: nikto_scan
function.description: Web server vulnerability scanner. Use for authorized web-app targets only.

network.description: true only if target is explicitly authorized for network access

function.name: semgrep_scan
function.description: Static analysis (SAST) of a local source tree for security bugs. Runs on local code you own.

path.description: Local directory or file to scan

function.name: nuclei_scan
function.description: Template-based vulnerability scanner for known web exposures. Use for authorized targets only.

network.description: true only if target is explicitly authorized for network access
